sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15203" key="a)rktu/los" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρκτύλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n15203.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bear's cub,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.15</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἄρκιλος, ἄρκυλλος.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
